summary: Completed comprehensive testing of merged Dashboard+Courses page, guest restrictions, and scroll fix. All 16 features verified. Dashboard shows 'This Week' hero + 2-column course grid. Guest mode works correctly with video room and download restrictions. Admin sees enroll buttons. Bottom nav links both go to /dashboard.

issues: Console warning: 'Encountered two children with the same key /dashboard' - Both Home and Courses nav items use same path '/dashboard' as key. Should use unique keys like 'nav-home' and 'nav-courses'.

passed_tests: Dashboard shows 'This Week' hero card at top with lesson title and progress
Courses are displayed in a 2-column grid on mobile (grid-cols-2)
Each course card has thumbnail, title, description, lesson count badge
Course search input filters courses correctly (1 result for 'Gospel', 5 when cleared)
Guest user can view the merged dashboard with courses
Guest user can click into a course and see lessons
Guest user can click into a lesson and see content
Guest user sees 'Sign up to join live video sessions' instead of Video Room
Guest user cannot download resources (toast error 'Sign up to download resources' on click)
Guest user does NOT see enroll buttons (0 visible)
Admin login works via landing page modal
Admin sees 'This Week' hero + courses grid with enroll buttons (5 visible)
Page scrolls fully to bottom (pb-44 padding working, no content cut off)
Landing page still accessible when logged out
Bottom nav Home link goes to /dashboard
Bottom nav Courses link goes to /dashboard
action_items: MINOR: Fix duplicate key warning in Layout.jsx - use unique keys for nav items instead of path (e.g., 'nav-home', 'nav-courses')
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard.jsx correctly implements merged Home+Courses view with 'This Week' hero and 2-column grid
LessonDetail.jsx correctly guards video room for guests (lines 624-631) showing 'Sign up to join live video sessions'
LessonDetail.jsx correctly guards resource downloads for guests (lines 1196-1198) with toast.error
Layout.jsx has pb-44 padding on mobile to prevent content cutoff by floating nav
Layout.jsx bottomNavItems both Home and Courses point to /dashboard (correct per requirements)
App.js /courses route correctly renders Dashboard component
AuthContext.js isGuest flag correctly identifies guest users
Course grid uses 'grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3' for responsive layout
context_for_next_testing_agent: Merged Dashboard+Courses page fully tested. Key verifications: 1) Dashboard shows 'This Week' hero card + 2-column course grid, 2) Guest can browse but sees 'Sign up to join live video sessions' instead of video room, 3) Guest download blocked with toast, 4) Guest does NOT see enroll buttons, 5) Admin sees enroll buttons and create course button, 6) Search filters courses correctly, 7) Both Home and Courses nav go to /dashboard, 8) pb-44 padding prevents scroll cutoff. Minor issue: duplicate key warning for /dashboard in nav items.

merged_dashboard.this_week_hero: VERIFIED - Shows lesson title, date, progress bar, and 'Begin/Continue/Review' CTA
merged_dashboard.courses_grid: VERIFIED - 2-column grid on mobile (grid-cols-2), 3-column on desktop (md:grid-cols-3)
merged_dashboard.course_cards: VERIFIED - Thumbnail, title, description, lesson count badge, enrollment count

guest_restrictions.video_room_blocked: VERIFIED - Shows 'Sign up to join live video sessions' card instead of VideoRoom component
guest_restrictions.download_blocked: VERIFIED - Toast error 'Sign up to download resources' on click
guest_restrictions.no_enroll_buttons: VERIFIED - 0 enroll buttons visible for guest
guest_restrictions.can_browse: VERIFIED - Guest can view courses, course details, lessons

scroll_fix.bottom_padding: VERIFIED - pb-44 on mobile prevents content cutoff
scroll_fix.mobile_nav_visible: VERIFIED - Floating nav visible at bottom
